{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Twin Messenger
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Twin Messenger]] is a type of individual capable of temporarily existing in two places at once.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Twin Messenger]] is a common [[Pattern]] used by [[Brani]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
